summary: The implementation successfully addresses all requirements. safeFetch utility was created with timeout, retry, and logging. All fetch calls replaced to use safeFetch with updated base URL. fetchUniverse24h replaces old functions. universeFilter.ts implements new threshold and fallback logic. 300ms delay added between kline fetches. engineLoop.ts handles null returns gracefully. New log event types added to store.ts. LogsTab.tsx displays new events with correct color coding.
